zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Hastings於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾塞頓 斯可特尼時，他的父親John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings49歲，母親Isabel le Despenser27歲。他於1327年5月18日與Margery Foliot結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1340年登記服兵役。他於1347年被列為appointed seneschal of gascony。他去世於1347年7月29日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾辛享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Hastings于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾塞頓 斯可特尼时，他的父亲John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings49岁，母亲Isabel le Despenser27岁。他于1327年5月18日与Margery Foliot结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1340年登记服兵役。他于1347年被列为appointed seneschal of gascony。他去世于1347年7月29日在英国英格兰諾福爾可艾爾辛享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可艾爾辛。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Hastings was born about 1310, in Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 49 and his mother, Isabel le Despenser, was 27. He married Margery Foliot on 18 May 1327. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1340. In 1347, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as appointed seneschal of gascony. He died on 29 July 1347, in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Hastings est né environ 1310, à Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Isabel le Despenser, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margery Foliot le 18 mai 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1340. En 1347, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed seneschal of gascony. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1347, à Elsing, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Elsing, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England: Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Hastings um 1310 in Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 49 und seine Mutter Isabel le Despenser 27. Er hat am 18. Mai 1327 Margery Foliot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1340 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1347, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als appointed seneschal of gascony aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Juli 1347 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Hastings è nato il circa 1310 nel Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Isabel le Despenser, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margery Foliot il 18 maggio 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1340. Nel 1347, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed seneschal of gascony. Morì il 29 luglio 1347, nel Elsing, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Elsing, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Hastingsが約1310年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアスットオン スコトニーで生まれた時，父John Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは49歳，母Isabel le Despenserは27歳であった。1327年5月18日にMargery Foliotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年に兵役登録をした。1347年，38歳の時，職業はappointed seneschal of gasconyと記録されている。彼は1347年7月29日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエルシングで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクエルシングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Hastings(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 수턴 스컷니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel le Despenser(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1327년 5월 18일 Margery Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1347년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 appointed seneschal of gascony이었다. 그는 1347년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 엘징에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 엘징에 묻혔다.

pt.Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England: Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Hastings nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Isabel le Despenser, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Foliot em 18 de maio de 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1340. Em 1347, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed seneschal of gascony. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1347, em Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England: Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Hastings родился около 1310 г. в местности суттон скотни, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel le Despenser, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Foliot 18 мая 1327 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1340 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1347 году, в возрасте 38 лет, работал по профессии appointed seneschal of gascony. Он умер 29 июля 1347 г. в местности элсинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности элсинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Hastings nació aproximadamente 1310, en Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Isabel le Despenser, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margery Foliot el 18 de mayo de 1327. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1340. En 1347, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed seneschal of gascony. Murió el 29 de julio de 1347, en Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
